items.title: EIP-7951: Precompile for secp256r1 Curve Support
items.description: Adds P256VERIFY precompile at address 0x100 for secp256r1 ECDSA signature verification (6900 gas). Enables native support for Apple Secure Enclave, Android Keystore, and FIDO2/WebAuthn. Supersedes RIP-7212 with security fixes.

items.title: Fulu -- The Beacon Chain
items.description: Fulu consensus-layer beacon chain specification. Includes EIP-7594 (PeerDAS), EIP-7917 (deterministic proposer lookahead), and EIP-7892 (blob parameter only hardforks). Defines modified process_execution_payload, BeaconState with proposer_lookahead, BlobParameters, and compute_fork_digest.
